description: You are an IT Asset Manager responsible for registering newly procured hardware in your organization's CMDB. A new Dell PowerEdge R760 rack server has been delivered and needs to be entered into CMDBuild. Log in to CMDBuild at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/ (admin/admin), navigate to the appropriate Server CI class, and create a new card with the details from the server specification sheet found at /home/ga/Desktop/server_spec_r760.txt. Enter the Code, Description, Serial Number, and Notes fields as specified in the document.

metadata.server_description: Dell PowerEdge R760 - Production DB Cluster Node 3
metadata.server_notes: Rack U12-14, PDU-A Port 8, iDRAC IP 10.20.30.47, 2x Intel Xeon Gold 6430 / 512GB DDR5 / 8x 2.4TB SAS
